hero.title: Creating incredible digital experiences
hero.name: Gerlinde Versyck - Business & Web Applications | Full-Stack Developer
hero.avatarAlt: Avatar of a woman with brown hair

codePhrase.subline: Accessible interfaces.•Maintainable architecture.•Thoughtful digital details.

about.title: About
paragraphs: I'm a web developer focused on creating accessible and maintainable experiences. I work with HTML5, CSS3 and vanilla JavaScript, emphasizing code quality and user experience.

I'm passionate about clean code and apply principles like SOLID, KISS and DRY in my projects. I believe in the importance of semantic HTML, responsive design and web accessibility to create applications usable by everyone.
Furthermore, I'm interested in continuously learning new technologies and best practices to grow as a professional developer.

skills.title: Skills
skills.intro: I work with a solid foundation in layout, responsive styles and logic in vanilla JavaScript, maintaining clear and easy to maintain code.

items.description: I structure semantic, accessible and well-organized web pages.
I create modern, consistent and easy to maintain styles.
I develop interactivity and clear logic with vanilla JavaScript.
I manage version control and collaborate on projects using Git.
I design interfaces adaptable for mobile, tablet and desktop.
I write clean, readable code focused on best practices.

cards.title: Project 1: My Personal Portfolio
cards.description: A personal portfolio built with HTML, CSS and JavaScript, focused on accessibility, responsive design and maintainable code.
cards.alt: Preview of the personal portfolio project

cards.title: Project 2: Components with React and Stencil
cards.description: A collection of reusable components built with React and Stencil, designed for modern and scalable user interfaces.
cards.alt: Preview of the React and Stencil project

cards.title: Project 3: Microfrontends and Microservices
cards.description: A modular architecture focused on scalability, combining a decoupled frontend with independent services.
cards.alt: Preview of the microfrontends and microservices project

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Do you want to discuss a project, collaboration or opportunity? Send me a message and I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
